\boxed{C}

The conversion factor from inches of mercury (inHg) to millibars (mbar) is approximately **33.86389 mbar per inHg**, which rounds to **33.9 mbar** for practical purposes. This is derived from the standard atmospheric pressure definitions, where 1 inHg ≈ 33.86 mbar. Option C is the closest and most accurate choice.
